form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (24.03) in a Grade 5, finishing a 15 length eighth. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Conceded ground abruptly upon entering the home turn.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 5th in a Mix 2/3 on April 4 over 400m at this track behind Chloe's Comet beaten 15 lengths (24.06). Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching the turn into the back straight and lost ground.
Heels galloped on rounding the turn into the front straight.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at this track. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Back from a three-and-a-half months spell and last resumed over 400m at this track where she was in the placings, finishing third. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Found trouble in the run at this course and distance last time and failed to finish before heading out for a four-and-a-half months spell. No luck latest but this looks tough and prefer the place.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 400m at this track. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (23.41) over 400m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate but in the mix on his best form.
